items.title: Typing a chat request
items.scenario: You build the messages array sent to an LLM and want roles restricted to valid values.
items.explanation: A literal union role: 'system' | 'user' | 'assistant' makes a typo like 'asistant' a compile error.

items.title: Safely handling a model's JSON
items.scenario: A model returns JSON you parse, but its shape isn't guaranteed.
items.explanation: Type it as unknown and narrow/validate before use, instead of trusting it as any.

items.title: Reusing a tool schema
items.scenario: Several functions accept the same tool-definition object.
items.explanation: An interface ToolDef gives one shared, extendable shape the compiler enforces everywhere.

items.title: Configuration object
items.scenario: Generation settings (model, temperature, optional maxTokens) flow through the app.
items.explanation: An interface with optional and readonly fields documents and enforces the config contract.
